title: We're here, 24×7.
lead: Call our line. Dr. Basanta Pradhan, MD will answer.
disclaimer_body: Dr. Pradhan provides after-hours emergency triage; he is an independent emergency partner physician, not a co-physician of SS Kidney Care. For routine nephrology consultations, please contact Dr. Sourav Shristi directly on the clinic line or via WhatsApp.
ambulance_body: Call the emergency line. Our team will dispatch the nearest ambulance and stay on the phone with you.
before_help: Keep the patient calm and seated or lying down.
Note the time of any symptom — when it started, what it felt like.
Have current medications and recent reports nearby.
Unlock the main door so paramedics can enter quickly.
